release.notifyCommand: NOTIFY_RESULT=always NOTIFY_VERSION=$VERSION pnpm tsx scripts/kody/notify.ts --agent release-publisher --channels slack --when always --color good --title "🚀 A-Guy v$VERSION released" --body "$(gh pr view $DEPLOY_PR_URL --json body --jq .body 2>/dev/null || echo "Release $VERSION finalized — $DEPLOY_PR_URL")"
